theme.name: Soft Minimalist Lime Dashboard
theme.visual_aesthetic: Clean, modern, flat-design influenced dashboard with a vibrant, playful background counterbalanced by stark white, highly rounded container cards and subtle purple accents.

component_mapping.main_container_card: bg-white rounded-[32px] p-6 shadow-none border border-transparent
component_mapping.asymmetric_header_card: bg-white rounded-tl-[48px] rounded-tr-[32px] rounded-br-[32px] rounded-bl-[32px] p-8
component_mapping.list_row_item: bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-[20px] p-4 flex items-center justify-between
component_mapping.pill_badge_gray: bg-gray-50 text-gray-700 text-xs font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-gray-100
component_mapping.action_button_primary: bg-[#d3ee7a] text-black font-semibold text-sm px-6 py-3 rounded-[14px] hover:opacity-90 transition
component_mapping.action_button_secondary: bg-white text-black border border-gray-200 font-semibold text-sm px-6 py-3 rounded-[14px] hover:bg-gray-50 transition
